The Residence

A serene country retreat in Sand Lake

Set on 3.24 private acres, this exceptional Sand Lake home blends comfort and craftsmanship in a peaceful, natural setting. With three bedrooms, three full baths, and generous indoor and outdoor living spaces filled with natural light, it's an ideal home for those seeking room to breathe and a true connection to the outdoors. Come experience the tranquility for yourself this Saturday.

Features & Setting

Every detail, considered

3.24 Private Acres

Expansive grounds offering privacy, space, and a genuine connection to nature.

2,041 Sq Ft

Thoughtfully laid out with three bedrooms and three full bathrooms for comfortable living.

Abundant Natural Light

Welcoming, light-filled interiors that bring warmth to every room.

Indoor–Outdoor Living

Expansive living spaces that flow effortlessly from inside to the surrounding landscape.

Serene Country Setting

A tranquil oasis tucked away in the heart of Sand Lake, New York.

Ideal for Family Living

Generous, versatile spaces designed to grow with you and welcome guests.
